_note: Seed data for ProspectQueue — extracted from Gmail drafts research. Countries are US unless noted. GB/IE drafts intentionally kept out (EU GDPR risk on automated cold send). User can add more via /admin/prospects.

prospects.firstSubject: SF industrial CRE — warehouse tenant inquiries 24/7
prospects.firstBody:
Hi Kidder Mathews SF team,

Bay Area industrial and logistics CRE sees fast-moving inquiries from e-commerce, tech-hardware, and international import/export tenants - many reaching out at odd hours from APAC or Europe.

Harvard Business Review: firms responding in under a minute convert 391% more leads than hour-plus replies. For SF industrial CRE, this is multi-year lease value.

CloserAI is a chat widget (one script tag, ~5-minute install) that qualifies commercial leads 24/7 in 50+ languages. It asks sqft needed, ceiling height, dock door count, timeline, budget range, and submarket, then shares your booking link for self-scheduled tours.

$299/month Starter with 14-day free trial, no credit card. Three ways to start:

- Live demo: https://closerai.org/demo
- Free missed-leads audit: https://closerai.org/tools/missed-leads-audit
- Self-install guide: https://closerai.org/book-install

100% self-serve, no phone calls.

Best,
Abdelrahman
CloserAI | https://closerai.org

prospects.firstBody:
Hi there,

I was looking at thehintonrealtygroup.com earlier and noticed there's no live chat catching visitors who land after hours.

I built a small AI assistant for real estate sites — greets every visitor in 30 seconds, qualifies them, and texts the agent the moment a hot lead comes in. Even at 11pm or on a Sunday.

Asheville agents using it have gone from 3-4 web leads a month to 15-20+ from the same traffic. The whole install is one script tag, about 5 minutes.

Would it be useful for the The Hinton Realty Group team? You can try it live yourself — no signup, no calls: https://closerai.org/demo
